title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: Intrinsic value estimation for Synchrony Financial.

assumptions.rationale: As a consumer finance and banking institution, Synchrony Financial generates interest income rather than traditional Free Cash Flow (FCF). Because FCF is not a meaningful metric for valuing financials (it returned 'None' in data fetching), a standard DCF model is unworkable. A Dividend Discount Model (DDM) or Residual Income model would be more appropriate.
